Русский
Kalashnikov Museum
Museum dedicated to the life and work of the legendary designer and the history of small arms in Izhevsk.

The exhibition tells the story of Mikhail Kalashnikov’s fate and inventions, whose name is inextricably linked with the development of small arms in Russia. The museum features a modern shooting range and interactive zones.
National Museum of Udmurtia
The main local lore museum of the republic, located in the historical Arsenal building.

The largest repository of artifacts representing the natural and cultural heritage of Udmurtia from ancient times to the present day. The museum is a key scientific and educational center of the region.
Sports History Center
A museum dedicated to the sporting achievements of Izhevsk athletes.

The exhibition presents awards, equipment, gear, and unique sports technology that tell the story of the development of physical culture in the city. The center plays an important role in promoting sports and preserving its history.
Kozhushkov Moto Museum
A private motorcycle museum based on the collection of the Kozhushkov family.

The exhibition is dedicated to the history of motorcycle production in Izhevsk and features unique motorcycle models produced at the Izhevsk Motor Plant. The museum was created by enthusiasts to showcase the city\'s industrial identity.
Opera and Ballet Theater of Udmurtia
The main musical stage of Udmurtia, named after the legendary local composer Tchaikovsky.

The theater presents a wide repertoire, including classical and modern opera and ballet productions, as well as operettas and musicals. It is the only academic theater in the birthplace of P. I. Tchaikovsky.
Russian Drama Theater of Udmurtia
One of the oldest theaters in Izhevsk.
The theater maintains an active creative life, producing plays based on Russian and world literature. With a history spanning decades, it continues to evolve and discover new names today.
Young Man Theater
A theater oriented toward young audiences and family viewing.

The repertoire includes productions based on classical and modern authors for both children and adults. The theater troupe regularly participates in festivals and has received numerous professional awards.
Puppet Theater of Udmurtia
A theater that has been delighting audiences with performances for children and adults for over 85 years.

The theater is known not only for its children\'s plays but also for productions for adult audiences, often participating in international festivals. It has a bilingual troupe and performs in both Russian and Udmurt.
Kirov Park
The largest forest-park zone in Izhevsk with a pond, amusement rides, and sports grounds.
The park offers active recreation year-round: amusement rides, a rope park, and equipment rentals in summer; an ice rink and ski trails in winter. It regularly hosts cultural events and concerts.
Gorky Summer Garden
The oldest park in Izhevsk, founded in the 19th century at the general\'s estate.

Located in the city center, the park combines a historical atmosphere with modern entertainment: rides, cafes, and access to the Izhevsk pond embankment. In winter, an ice rink is set up on the grounds.
Birch Grove
A green park in the city center, the main venue for Udmurt national holidays.
A cozy park perfect for walks, picnics, or visiting cafes with national cuisine. It preserves the natural landscape while providing conditions for both peaceful and active recreation.
Seti Park
The only specialized park for extreme sports in Udmurtia.
The park is equipped with professional areas for skateboarding, BMX, basketball, and other street disciplines. It is a free training ground for athletes of all skill levels.
Izhevsk

This is your personal guide to the cultural and entertainment life of the capital of Udmurtia.

 The application was developed as part of Laboratory Work No. 4 for the "Mobile Application Development" course.

 Completed by: Zaytsev Vyacheslav
 Group: B23-191-3
Welcome to Izhevsk!
The armory capital of Russia, a city of labor glory and the birthplace of the legendary Kalashnikov rifle.
Izhevsk: City Guide
This app will show you the best museums, theaters, and parks in Izhevsk.
